text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: On the way back from the race...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh, I beg your pardon. That was rude of me...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I'm fine. This is nothing I can't handle.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
It is just one more barrier I must overcome... if I'm
to make it to the top.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite what she says, Grass Wonder is visibly
exhausted. I may have to adjust her racing
schedule for the near future.
